revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:Dĭng (tiĕng-găng)]][[fr:Ding (tige céleste)]][[gan:丁]][[hak:Tên (thiên-kôn)]][[ja:丁]][[ko:정 (천간)]][[vi:Đinh (Thiên can)]][[za:Ding (diengan)]][[zh-classical:丁]][[zh-min-nan:Teng (Thian-kan)]][[zh-yue:丁]][[zh:丁 (天干)]]
{{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches|qq=}} '''Hinoto''' (丁) is the fourth of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}.<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=7686a32a2b1f3e220498e5031f21e40ffe14c5c1146b854be0ff61231a043eb1JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Hinoto+(%e4%b8%81)+dictionary&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjExMyZlbGVtZW50X2lkPTcyMTc4Izp-OnRleHQ9TGlzdGVuJTIwdG8lMjB0aGUlMjBwcm9udW5jaWF0aW9uJTJDJTIwdmlldyUyMGVuZ2xpc2glMjBtZWFuaW5ncyUyQyxzdHJva2UlMjBvcmRlciUyMGRpYWdyYW1zJTIwYW5kJTIwY29uanVnYXRpb25zJTIwZm9yJTIwJUU0JUI4JTgxJTIwJTI4aGlub3RvJTI5Lg&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=0adc8cf5d7088d903e3d2e16b01a1b856157a7cde01641d4a5a09de3c0b4f2b8JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Hinoto+(%e4%b8%81)+dictionary&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuamFwYW5kaWN0LmNvbS8lRTQlQjglODE&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=6592da2c1ee83e5cd9a6bb30393329e761d5075dd8499c8526197736422c4561JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Hinoto+(%e4%b8%81)+dictionary&u=a1aHR0cDovL3d3dy5yb21hamlkZXN1LmNvbS9kaWN0aW9uYXJ5L21lYW5pbmctb2YtJUUzJTgxJUIyJUUzJTgxJUFFJUUzJTgxJUE4Lmh0bWw&ntb=1</ref>
According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行説|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 陰陽五行思想}}, it is assigned to the '''Yin Fire''' element, which is why in Japan it is also called "hinoto" (火の弟, "Younger Brother of Fire").
== Pronunciations: 丁 (Stem 4) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Dīng * Korean: Jeong (정) * Vietnamese: Đinh * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Tei (てい) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Hinoto (ひのと, 火の弟 – “Younger Fire”)
== Overview == * The character "丁" is an {{ill|Ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Hieroglyph|qid=Q193762}} representing a human head<ref>{{Citation| author=Gao Hongjin| year=1960| title=中国字例 (Chinese Character Examples)| location=Taipei| publisher=Taiwan Provincial Normal University Press |pages=122–3|qq=}}</ref>. Its use to denote the fourth position among the Ten Heavenly Stems is due to {{ill|Loan usage|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Loan usage|1=Loangraph|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10888485}}. * When the Ten Heavenly Stems are used for Ranking, 丁 represents the fourth position. In the past, school grades were marked using "Kō, Otsu, Hei, and Tei" (甲乙丙丁), with 丁 being the lowest grade. * Years ending in 7 in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} correspond to '''Hinoto years'''. Another term for such years is '''Kyōgō''' (強圉)<ref>{{Cite web |title=古代天干地支的别称及解释 (Ancient Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches Names and Explanations) |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref>. * In the Chinese {{ill|Chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q20826683}}, '''Hinoto''' is used to name compounds containing four carbon atoms, such as {{ill|Butane|en|Butane|qid=Q134192|lt=Butane|1=Butane}} and the {{ill|Butyl group|en|Butyl group|qid=Q656556|lt=Butyl group|1=Butyl group}}. * The term "丁-shaped" (丁字形) is used to describe objects shaped like the character 丁. Roads with this shape are called '''"Hinoto Roads"''' (丁字路, *Teijiro*), which corresponds to a T-junction. According to Japan's {{ill|Road Traffic Law|ja|道路交通法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Road Traffic Law|1=Road Traffic Act|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11641816}}, Article 2, Clause 5, "A junction refers to a place where two or more roads intersect, including T-junctions and cross-intersections". In modern usage, the term "T-junction" (T字路) is becoming more common<ref>{{Cite web |title=丁字路？ T字路？ {{!|qq=}} NHK Language Research Institute |url=https://www.nhk.or.jp/bunken/summary/kotoba/term/064.html |website=www.nhk.or.jp |access-date=2023-11-02|qq=}}</ref>. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Mizunoe|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}}. * The '''Eho''' (lucky direction) associated with Hinoto is '''North-Northwest slightly to the north (345 degrees)'''.
== Sexagenary cycles containing Hinoto (丁) == {{wiktionary|丁}} {| class="wikitable alternance droite" |{{ill|Yin Fire Rabbit|ja|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|zh|1=Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=ja|丁卯|ko|정묘|fr|Lièvre de feu|de|Feuer-Hase|en|Fire Rabbit|lt=丁卯 (Yin Fire Rabbit)|lt_ko=정묘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rabbit|qq=}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Fire Ox|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|丁丑|1=Yin Fire Ox|zh|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|丁丑|1=Yin Fire Ox|ko|정축|fr|Buffle de feu|de|Feuer-Büffel|en|Fire Ox|lt=丁丑 (Yin Fire Ox)|lt_ko=정축|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Fire Pig|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|zh|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|丁亥|ko|정해|fr|Cochon de feu|de|Feuer-Schwein|en|Fire Pig|lt=丁亥 (Yin Fire Pig)|lt_ko=정해|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Fire Rooster|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|zh|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|ko|정유 (간지)|fr|Coq de feu|de|Feuer-Hahn|en|Fire Rooster|lt=丁酉 (Yin Fire Rooster)|lt_ko=정유|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Fire Goat|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|丁未|zh|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|丁未|ko|정미|fr|Chèvre de feu|de|Feuer-Schaf|en|Fire Goat|lt=丁未 (Yin Fire Goat)|lt_ko=정미|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yin Fire Snake|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|zh|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|ko|정사|fr|Serpent de feu|de|Feuer-Schlange|en|Fire Snake|lt=丁巳 (Yin Fire Snake)|lt_ko=정사|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} == See also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}
